## Checklist

- [ ] No business logic added to `backend/ui/` (views render; `analysis/` computes)
- [ ] New user-facing numbers ship with their evidence/findings (explainability rule)
- [ ] LLM-generated content passes deterministic validation before reaching documents
- [ ] Paths go through `backend/config.py`
- [ ] `docs/RESULTS.md` updated from a real run, if results changed
- [ ] Ran relevant smoke tests (e.g. `python -m backend.resume_engine.validate_tailored`)
